name: easy-bdd
description: AI-powered BDD testing assistant for the Easy BDD framework — run, validate, fix, and generate YAML test cases with TestRail and Playwright integration.
long_description:
Easy BDD is a YAML-driven BDD testing framework with multi-protocol support (browser, API, WebSocket, serial, AWS). This MCP server exposes the framework to AI models as tools, resources, and prompts.

**Tools include:** running tests, validating YAML syntax, auto-fixing errors, probing selectors on live pages, importing Playwright recordings, syncing with TestRail, and generating tests via Ollama.

**Prompts include:** generate_tests, debug_failure, and validate_and_fix — packaged workflows for common QA tasks.

**Requires:** Python 3.10+, uv runtime.

tools.name: list_tests
tools.description: List Easy BDD test files, optionally filtered by tags

tools.name: get_test
tools.description: Return raw YAML content of a single test file

tools.name: validate_test
tools.description: Validate a test file or YAML snippet for syntax errors

tools.name: run_tests
tools.description: Run Easy BDD tests (dry_run=true by default)

tools.name: get_failure_trace
tools.description: Return execution trace from the most recent test report

tools.name: preview_fix
tools.description: Preview auto-correctable fixes without writing files

tools.name: apply_fix
tools.description: Apply auto-correctable fixes to a test YAML file in place

tools.name: validate_testrail_case
tools.description: Validate Easy BDD syntax in TestRail test cases via API

tools.name: probe_selector
tools.description: Test whether CSS/ARIA/text selectors resolve on a live page

tools.name: fix_test_selectors
tools.description: Heal selector issues in a YAML file against a live page

tools.name: fix_crawled_tests
tools.description: Batch-heal selector issues across multiple crawled test files

tools.name: get_testrail_run_failures
tools.description: Fetch failed/retest cases from a TestRail run

tools.name: repush_yaml_to_testrail
tools.description: Re-push a YAML file's steps to a TestRail case's Preconditions

tools.name: import_playwright_recording
tools.description: Convert a Playwright recording to Easy BDD YAML test cases

tools.name: ollama_chat
tools.description: Send a prompt directly to the configured Ollama model

tools.name: ollama_analyze_test
tools.description: Ask Ollama to review an Easy BDD test case and suggest improvements

tools.name: ollama_generate_tests
tools.description: Ask Ollama to generate new Easy BDD test cases for a feature

tools.name: ollama_improve_testrail_case
tools.description: Fetch a TestRail case and improve its steps via Ollama

prompts.name: generate_tests
prompts.description: Generate Easy BDD test cases for a module or feature
prompts.text: Generate complete, runnable Easy BDD YAML test cases for the module '${arguments.module}'. ${arguments.description}

prompts.name: debug_failure
prompts.description: Diagnose a failing test and suggest a concrete fix
prompts.text: Diagnose why the Easy BDD test '${arguments.test_name}' failed (report: ${arguments.report_path}) and suggest a concrete YAML fix.

prompts.name: validate_and_fix
prompts.description: Validate a test file and interactively apply suggested fixes
prompts.text: Validate the Easy BDD test file at '${arguments.path}', explain each issue found, and apply auto-fixable corrections after confirming with me.

testrail_api_key.title: TestRail API Key
testrail_api_key.description: TestRail API key (generate in My Settings → API Keys)

ollama_base_url.title: Ollama Base URL
ollama_base_url.description: Base URL for the local Ollama server

ollama_model.title: Ollama Model
ollama_model.description: Ollama model name for AI-powered test generation and analysis
